name: Marshall Fit Power Rack
notes: Heavy commercial-style rack with white laser-numbered uprights and black hardware. Serves as the hub for rack-mounted stations and attachments. No jammer arms; the bulky black upright units are cable system housings.

stations.name: Integrated Dual Cable System
stations.notes: Two selectorized cable columns built into the rack. Each side is capped at 150 lb for single-arm or single-side loading; linked sides provide up to 300 lb total loading.

stations.name: Multi-Grip Pull-Up Bar
stations.notes: Fixed top pull-up bar with neutral, wide, and standard grip options.

stations.name: BTS Smith Attachment
stations.notes: Bulletproof Fitness Victor-Tony-Snake guided Smith rail attachment that runs on the rack uprights.

stations.name: Landmine Attachment
stations.notes: Rack-mounted landmine pivot that loads a barbell.

stations.name: Pritchett Pad
stations.notes: Chest-supported pad that connects to the rack for supported rowing setups.

stations.name: Rogue Leg Roller / Hip-Thrust Attachment
stations.notes: Padded roller mounted to the rack for hip-thrust and leg-support setups.

stations.name: Spotter Arms + J-Cups
stations.notes: Rack safety arms and barbell hooks for secure barbell setup and safeties.

name: Bulletproof Isolator with Leg Developer
notes: Standalone multi-isolation attachment currently stored on the floor. Includes the leg developer roller pad. Confirm the full Bulletproof Isolator movement chart before expanding supported movements.

name: Dumbbells
notes: Hex/rubber dumbbells from 5 to 125 lb: 5 lb increments from 5 to 60, 10 lb increments from 60 to 110, and 5 lb increments from 110 to 125.

name: Barbells
notes: Includes 2 Rogue Ohio Bars at 45 lb, 2 Rogue Bella Bars at 35 lb with 25 mm shafts, 1 generic 45 lb Olympic bar, and 1 EZ curl bar.

name: Bumper Plates
notes: Rogue bumper plates including green 25s, blue 45s, yellow/black 35s, and training plates.

name: Adjustable FID Bench
notes: Flat, incline, and decline adjustable bench for free-weight and supported setups.

name: ATG USA Platform
notes: Squat and elevation board for raised and deficit setup options.

name: Resistance Bands
notes: Resistance bands stored with the gym accessories.

name: Ab Roller
notes: Ab roller stored with the gym accessories.

name: Rogue MAG Grip Handles
notes: Rogue MAG grip handles for the cable system, stored on the rack pegboard.

name: Tricep Ropes
notes: Rope attachments for the cable system, stored on the rack pegboard.

name: V-Bars
notes: V-bar cable attachments stored on the rack pegboard.

name: Assorted Cable Attachments
notes: Assorted cable attachments stored on the rack pegboard.
